name: libbluetooth-dev
title: libbluetooth-dev
summary: Development files for using the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth library
description:
Development files for using the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth library
BlueZ is the official Linux Bluetooth protocol stack. It is an Open Source
project distributed under GNU General Public License (GPL).
.
This package contains the development libraries and header files you need to
develop your programs using the libbluetooth library.
